productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men M Rsp Black Shorts
description: Composition Black shorts made of 100% polyester ClimaCool fabric, with insert pockets on the sides, elasticated waist with drawstring on the inside, printed logo on the left leg, mesh panel below the waistband on the back and stylized adidas 3-Stripes printed below the pockets along the sides Fitting Comfort Wash care Wash dark colours separately below 30 degrees Do not soak or bleach Do not tumble dry Flat dry in shade Cool iron Do not iron on print/trims Do not dry clean Made of ClimaCool fabric, these adidas shorts are ideal for all your fitness, Sports training and competition needs. These shorts are made with a breathable fabric combination that is better than cotton to wick sweat away from your skin and keep you comfortably cool. It has a ventilated design that allow you to focus on performance while you indulge in your favourite sport or fitness activity. While the soft and broad elastic waistband sits snugly, the drawstrings on the inside allow you to create a customized Fit and the deep side pockets can hold your essentials when you're on the move. Pair it with ClimaCool t-shirt from adidas and achieve maximum performance. Model statistics The model wears trousers, length of 41.5" Height-6.1", Waist-31"
